creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-26 17:49:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/etracer        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a port for Extreme Tux Racer, the latest fork of the classic Tux Racer,
  which involves racing downhill as tux.
  Extreme Tux Racer contains many new courses, cups and other features.
  
  WWW: http://extremetuxracer.com/
  
  PR:             ports/120998
  Submitted by:   Peter Dunning
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1195    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/games/etracer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/etracer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/games/etracer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +471 -0    ports/games/etracer/pkg-plist (new)
